scenario_name: patient shell loads and keeps focus_frame or mission_stack law at 320px
required_assertions: shell markers, breakpoint marker, decision dock presence, long-form measure remains readable
notes: Proves the patient shell does not collapse into dashboard density on narrow viewports.

required_assertions: visible focus ring, nav order, dominant CTA reachable without pointer
notes: Covers keyboard-first navigation and announcement-safe quiet posture.

scenario_name: patient same-shell route morph preserves selected anchor
required_assertions: no full reload, selected anchor preserved, design contract digest updates in place
notes: Closes findings 86, 87, 97, 98, 99, 101, and 120 on the browser side.

scenario_name: workspace shell mission_stack fold at tablet width
required_assertions: mission_stack layout, queue retained, task anchor still visible
notes: Ensures fold and unfold preserve the current task context.

scenario_name: workspace keyboard flow from queue into task plane
required_assertions: queue rows, task plane actions, support region all tab in stable order
notes: Matches the keyboard-first clinical workspace contract.

scenario_name: workspace child-state transition stays in the same shell
required_assertions: same shell reused, selected task pinned, support region does not multiply
notes: Protects same-shell more-info, approval, and decision postures.

scenario_name: operations board renders NorthStarBand, BottleneckRadar, ServiceHealthGrid, and InterventionWorkbench
required_assertions: one dominant anomaly surface, one dominant action region, visual summary-first hierarchy
notes: Confirms the operations layout is board-like rather than card-grid-like.

required_assertions: visual and table parity, authoritative state marker, selected anomaly sync
notes: A chart without adjacent table parity fails publication law.

scenario_name: governance shell keeps ScopeRibbon and status strip as the only sticky header stack
required_assertions: scope ribbon visible, change envelope retained, approval stepper reachable
notes: Prevents route-local warning bars or detached success strips from taking over the shell.

scenario_name: governance review keeps change anchor and release tuple through route morph
required_assertions: change envelope preserved, tuple card remains visible, no hard reload
notes: Closes finding 95 and keeps release-watch context in the same continuity path.

scenario_name: reduced motion mode preserves meaning without spatial travel
required_assertions: motion markers downgrade, content order stable, no hidden readiness
notes: Reduced motion remains first-class rather than a late CSS patch.

scenario_name: accessibility smoke across four shell demos
required_assertions: landmarks, tab order, accessible names, semantic surface markers, no hidden critical controls
notes: The showcase may remain calm only while accessibility coverage remains complete.
